titlestmt.titleproper: Committee on United States/Latin American Relations printed material39-6-2796
titlestmt.author: Compiled by E. Keating

publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2021-02-21 18:17:45 -0500.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.unittitle: Committee on United States/Latin American Relations printed material

origination.label: creator
origination.corpname: Cornell University. Committee on United States/Latin American Relations,

did.physdesc: Magazines, periodicals, newsletters, articles, reports, and other materials.
did.abstract: Printed resource materials relating to Latin America collected by CUSLAR, including magazines, periodicals, newsletters, articles, and reports.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Committee on United States/Latin American Relations printed material, #39-6-2796. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Printed resource materials relating to Latin America collected by CUSLAR, including magazines, periodicals, newsletters, articles, and reports.

scopecontent.head: Scope and content
scopecontent.p: Also 9 posters and 2 issues of the Cornell Daily Sun containing articles re CUSLAR events, 2006-2007

did.unittitle: Cornell course: Women, "Feminism," and Change in Latin America - taught by Veronica Frenkel

Working papers and publications concerning Latin America

Report submitted to Cornell's BOT - Investments in South Africa
CIA/FBI- Illegal surveillance, political repression- articles

Chile - newspaper clippings, publications, memos, correspondence

Central America - Central America Report and April 1982 copy of Central America Monitor
The Network of Educators' Committee on Central America and Central America in the Classroom
Urgent Action Alert sheets and responses to letters
Central America - Central America Report published by Inforpress Centroamericana
Central America - Central America Report published by Inforpress Centroamericana
"The New Revolutionary Mood in Latin America" by Richard Shaull
Central America - US policy towards Central America

NISGUA- Network in Solidarity with the People of Guatemala
HAP-NICA - Humanitarian Assistance for Independent Agricultural Development in Nicaragua-Research material
NISGUA - Network in Solidarity with the People of Guatemala
COMADRES - Committee of Mothers and Relatives of Political Prisoners, Disappeared, Assassinated of El Salvador, "Monsignor Oscar Romero"
